response.step_by_step_log: 1. Scanned video. 2. Identified two segments: a talk segment and a performance segment. 3. Used OCR on the song title appearing at 01:54: 'はじまりの魔法 -charm-' and credited composer/arranger '三好啓太' (Keita Miyoshi). 4. Searched for '"はじまりの魔法 -charm-" Keita Miyoshi Japanese and English lyrics'. 5. Retrieved lyrics and translated appropriately.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a group of Hololive Production VTubers engaging in a brief talk/interaction segment followed by a choreographed dance performance to the song "Hajimari no Mahou -charm-".

scenes.description: Opening scene with music, but no clear singing vocals.
Full choreographed performance of the song "Hajimari no Mahou -charm-". The title appears on screen at the start of the song.
scenes.performer_in_video: Hololive Production VTubers (Shirakami Fubuki, Sakura Miko, Shiranui Flare, Hoshimachi Suisei, Himemori Luna, Houshou Marine)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
きみに 魔法をかけるよ
We cast a spell on your dream!!
はじまりを告げる 衝動が響く
気づいた時がいつだって スタートラインなんだ
叶った望みと 叶わない願い
それぞれが等しく流れてく世界で 何を求めて 歩き続けてる
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I will cast a spell on you
We cast a spell on your dream!!
The impulse that signals the start echoes
Whenever you realize it, it's always the starting line
In a world where fulfilled desires and unfulfilled wishes
Flow equally, what are you seeking as you keep walking?
